benchmark_intent: Verify whether the research-designation construction patch can push at least one regular AI empire to 3,000+ monthly research before 2350 without hidden bonuses.

settings.gigastructural_engineering_preset: Arcade; screenshot evidence shows uncapped megastructures and enabled crisis/warship systems
settings.tech_cost: 0.5x if matching prior constrained benchmark setup

target_game_version: Repo target Stellaris 4.4.5; live runtime displayed Pegasus v4.4.4 (7d82) at launch
